programme.title: Good Bones
programme.sub-title: Scary to Chic in Old Southside
programme.desc: With her son in tow and another baby on the way, Mina returns to Old Southside where she and Karen aim to turn an insect-infested lot into a chic oasis for a new family.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a vacant lot, and what begins as a new construction quickly turns into a build for Mina's friends. A lingering pipe issue may add time and a hefty price tag to the project.

programme.title: The Nate & Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: A couple dreams of raising their own family in his grandparents' 1950s home, but the house needs major updates.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in an upscale neighbourhood in Laguna Beach, California. Even though the house is small, it has an ocean view which means big money.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina buy a large home in Anaheim, California, with some strange additions that could end up costing them thousands of dollars and square footage.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Tight Space or Tight Finances in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
programme.desc: A dream job prompts a family of four to leave California and start anew in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: To Compromise or Not in Austin
programme.desc: A 25-year-old software engineer looks to buy her first home in Austin, Texas. She's looking for a place with vintage charm.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Cutting Costs on the New Jersey Coast
programme.desc: A family sets their sights on Ocean County, where homes allow residents to enjoy the ocean. After years of visiting family and friends, buying a home will give them a place to call their own.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: This program shows you how you can dramatically improve your garden with the use of tropical plants and water features. We also show you a very versatile product you should be using for bigger and tastier citrus, strawberries and tomatoes.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: Scotty and Shelley visit to check on progress and discover one couple is struggling with the work load. Their lack of experience could mean one less room for the judges on reveal day.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An empty nester looks to return home to spend more time with family in the Hague, Netherlands. She's still helping her children financially, finding a place on a fixed budget.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Tight Space or Tight Finances in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
programme.desc: A dream job prompts a family of four to leave California and start anew in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: To Compromise or Not in Austin
programme.desc: A 25-year-old software engineer looks to buy her first home in Austin, Texas. She's looking for a place with vintage charm.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in an upscale neighbourhood in Laguna Beach, California. Even though the house is small, it has an ocean view which means big money.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina buy a large home in Anaheim, California, with some strange additions that could end up costing them thousands of dollars and square footage.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.sub-title: Scary to Chic in Old Southside
programme.desc: With her son in tow and another baby on the way, Mina returns to Old Southside where she and Karen aim to turn an insect-infested lot into a chic oasis for a new family.

programme.title: The Nate & Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: A couple dreams of raising their own family in his grandparents' 1950s home, but the house needs major updates.

programme.title: Home Town Takeover
programme.sub-title: A Little Spark Can Go a Long Way
programme.desc: Taking on Wetumpka's main thoroughfare, Ben and Erin get some help from Steve Ford and Tamara Day to give each storefront individual flair.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.sub-title: Week Two Rooms Impress the Judges
programme.desc: It's the end of a huge week of renovating as the contestants race to deliver their laundries, bathrooms and drying terraces.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a property in the upscale neighbourhood of Palos Verdes, California. The house may be small but because of the area it could sell for over $1 million.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted about home in El Monte California but they can't take a look at the inside before making an offer. After checking out the outside they make an offer and get it for a good price.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a vacant lot, and what begins as a new construction quickly turns into a build for Mina's friends. A lingering pipe issue may add time and a hefty price tag to the project.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A lawyer from Washington, DC, takes a leap into the unknown and accepts a research fellowship in Tokyo.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Scottish Surfin' Safari on the Sunshine Coast
programme.desc: A young man looks to break free from a traditional Scottish lifestyle for sun and surfing on the Sunshine Coast of Australia.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A hip millennial is tired of expensive rent and ready to buy her first home in Atlanta.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan take on a decrepit house from Detroit's past that they hope to turn into a shining beacon of the city's sustainable future. Their design includes cork, reclaimed wood and a few tech surprises.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Two seasoned flipping partners are in dire need of help after buying a house on a busy street and under a flight path; Page discovers their designs are decades out of style.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After scratching her way to a million-dollar win, a woman and her husband upsize their retirement plans to include a place on the shores of Pamlico Sound in North Carolina.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: After losing big money to a bad contractor, a single man is finally ready to trust a professional again with a home that's frozen in the '60s.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A lawyer from Washington, DC, takes a leap into the unknown and accepts a research fellowship in Tokyo.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Scottish Surfin' Safari on the Sunshine Coast
programme.desc: A young man looks to break free from a traditional Scottish lifestyle for sun and surfing on the Sunshine Coast of Australia.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A hip millennial is tired of expensive rent and ready to buy her first home in Atlanta.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan take on a decrepit house from Detroit's past that they hope to turn into a shining beacon of the city's sustainable future. Their design includes cork, reclaimed wood and a few tech surprises.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Two seasoned flipping partners are in dire need of help after buying a house on a busy street and under a flight path; Page discovers their designs are decades out of style.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After scratching her way to a million-dollar win, a woman and her husband upsize their retirement plans to include a place on the shores of Pamlico Sound in North Carolina.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After getting a surprise wedding gift in the form of a $1 million scratchie win, a young couple are looking for a home with old-fashioned charm and space to start a family in Worcester, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: After losing big money to a bad contractor, a single man is finally ready to trust a professional again with a home that's frozen in the '60s.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a property in the upscale neighbourhood of Palos Verdes, California. The house may be small but because of the area it could sell for over $1 million.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted about home in El Monte California but they can't take a look at the inside before making an offer. After checking out the outside they make an offer and get it for a good price.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Scottish Surfin' Safari on the Sunshine Coast
programme.desc: A young man looks to break free from a traditional Scottish lifestyle for sun and surfing on the Sunshine Coast of Australia. He's looking for something rustic that's near the beach, but he may need to consider a place with roommates.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A hip millennial is tired of expensive rent and ready to buy her first home in Atlanta. She's insisting on a big yard and a prime city location no matter the cost, but her boyfriend and dad think she should aim lower.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway we are off to some of Europe's great cities. We'll visit Budapest, Vienna, Cologne and Amsterdam all while cruising the magnificent rivers of Europe in style.

programme.title: Postcards
programme.desc: Kris explores the Briars Wildlife Sanctuary in Mount Martha. Madeline visits a charming general store in Strath Creek. Lauren unlocks hidden gems in the CBD. And Shane enjoys a delicious seaside barbecue in Anglesea.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: Join us for the hands on final episode of The Garden Gurus Autumn series, focused on winter jobs you need to undertake before the cold winter months.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.sub-title: Week Two Rooms Impress the Judges
programme.desc: It's the end of a huge week of renovating as the contestants race to deliver their laundries, bathrooms and drying terraces. Its only their second week on The Block and the efforts of one team take the judges by surprise.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A lawyer from Washington, DC, takes a leap into the unknown and accepts a research fellowship in Tokyo. He's emerged in a vastly different culture, and finding a place in a small and expensive real estate market will be a challenge.

programme.title: Hello SA
programme.desc: We visit Vinteloper and Bottle Shock in the Adelaide Hills, head to the Barossa with Adelaide Sightseeing, check out Discovery Parks Clare Valley and explore Monarto Safari Resort.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A hip millennial is tired of expensive rent and ready to buy her first home in Atlanta. She's insisting on a big yard and a prime city location no matter the cost, but her boyfriend and dad think she should aim lower.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a property in the upscale neighbourhood of Palos Verdes California. The house may be small but because of the area it could sell for over 1 million.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted about home in El Monte California but they can't take a look at the inside before making an offer. After checking out the outside they make an offer and get it for a good price.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan take on a decrepit house from Detroit's past that they hope to turn into a shining beacon of the city's sustainable future. Using eco-conscious materials, their design includes cork, reclaimed wood and a few tech surprises.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: After losing big money to a shifty contractor, a single man is finally ready to trust a professional again with a home that's frozen in the '60s.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After scratching her way to a million-dollar win, a woman and her husband upsize their retirement plans to include a place on the shores of Pamlico Sound in North Carolina.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: When Laura and John got engaged, they got a surprise early wedding gift in the form of a $1 million win on a scratch card. Now they are looking for a home with some old-fashioned charm to start a family in Worcester, Massachusetts.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: Judge Darren Palmer treats the fans to a styling workshop where they learn how to make the most out of their apartments. It's party time for all the contestants as they celebrate a very special bucks night.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a four bedroom home in Cypress California that the owner is looking to sell quickly. The home is a mess but already has an open floor plan which will save them money in the long run.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Fullerton, CA, with a fantastic view. When strange additions and design challenges collide, however, this quick flip turns out to be harder than anticipated.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Two seasoned flipping partners are in dire need of help after buying a house on a busy street and under a flight path; Page discovers their designs are decades out of style.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Two small business owners sell their expansive home and downsize in Madrid. With no experience living outside California, the frugal husband hopes to prevent his wife from spending too much of their savings.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Forever-Moon in Auckland, New Zealand
programme.desc: After unexpectedly falling in love with Auckland, Chicago newlyweds transform their honeymoon into a permanent move to New Zealand. Their \.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Searching for Inspiration in South Carolina
programme.desc: A couple who recently got out of debt are now ready to upgrade into a larger family home in Greenville, South Carolina. She wants a newer build with a lower price, but he doesn't mind spending more on character.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: With the help of a local historian and a Revolutionary War expert, the team saves a legendary fort dating back to 1775 in Lake Lure, NC.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family of eight sets out to build an underground home in the rolling foothills of Idaho, but Mother Nature has other plans for them. Before they even pour concrete, they face a decision that will make or break their build.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: The teams continue to struggle as their build seasons come to a close. Jackie's team hurries to finish the interior, the Owens team is at risk of not finishing on time, and the Hills brave one more journey to their build site.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: A couple's unique, circular home boasts 360-degree windows with stunning wraparound mountain views. But the property lacks function and style. Ben and Cristi take on a challenge they've never faced before: transforming a dome into a home.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Two small business owners sell their expansive home and downsize in Madrid. With no experience living outside California, the frugal husband hopes to prevent his wife from spending too much of their savings.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Forever-Moon in Auckland, New Zealand
programme.desc: After unexpectedly falling in love with Auckland, Chicago newlyweds transform their honeymoon into a permanent move to New Zealand. Their \.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Searching for Inspiration in South Carolina
programme.desc: A couple who recently got out of debt are now ready to upgrade into a larger family home in Greenville, South Carolina. She wants a newer build with a lower price, but he doesn't mind spending more on character.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family of eight sets out to build an underground home in the rolling foothills of Idaho, but Mother Nature has other plans for them. Before they even pour concrete, they face a decision that will make or break their build.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: The teams continue to struggle as their build seasons come to a close. Jackie's team hurries to finish the interior, the Owens team is at risk of not finishing on time, and the Hills brave one more journey to their build site.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: A couple's unique, circular home boasts 360-degree windows with stunning wraparound mountain views. But the property lacks function and style. Ben and Cristi take on a challenge they've never faced before: transforming a dome into a home.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway we are off to some of Europe's great cities. We'll visit Budapest, Vienna, Cologne and Amsterdam all while cruising the magnificent rivers of Europe in style.
